what.title: What is lip filler,
what.desc: Lip filler is a gel injection placed into specific parts of the lips to improve:
what.note: Made of hyaluronic acid (HA) - naturally exists in the body, holds water for softer, hydrated lips.
what.goal1: My upper lip disappears when I smile.
what.goal2: My lips look dry even with balm.
what.goal4: I want a nicer shape, not a dramatic change.
what.goal5: I want my lipstick to sit better.

results.title: Four Ways Lip Filler Transforms
results.type1Desc: Softness and smooth texture more than volume
results.type2Desc: Cleaner outline, clearer cupid's bow, better lipstick edges
results.type3Desc: Gentle plump look that still fits your face
results.type4Desc: For asymmetry, uneven corners, or upper lip that disappears
results.timelineDesc: Swelling often improves in 24-48 hours, but can take up to a week. Book at least two weeks before a big event.

who.forTitle: Lip filler is for you if you:
who.for3: want more balance between top and bottom lip
who.for5: want a treatment with minimal downtime
who.waitTitle: You may need to delay if you:
who.wait2: have an active cold sore or skin infection
who.wait3: have a major dental infection or planned surgery
who.waitNote: A doctor consultation is the right place to confirm suitability.

process.title: Your Lip Filler Journey
process.step1Desc: We analyze your natural lip shape, movement, and what feels 'off' to you.
process.step2Desc: HA fillers contain lidocaine; we use additional numbing for your comfort.
process.step3Desc: Small amounts placed where they create the best shape, not 'fill everywhere'.
process.step4Desc: Clear guidance on what's normal and when to call.

prosCons.durationDesc: Depending on metabolism, filler type, and amount used. Small top-ups help maintain consistency.
prosCons.pro4: HA fillers can be dissolved if needed

cost.title: Lip Filler Cost in Kuala Lumpur
cost.desc: Prices vary by brand, amount, and complexity. Here's what you'll typically see:
cost.advice: At Nexus Clinic, the right price is based on your goals, not a random package.
cost.vol1Desc: Perfect for first-timers wanting hydration or light definition
cost.vol2Desc: More visible volume and shape changes
cost.vol3Desc: Better done gradually across sessions to avoid heavy look
cost.compareFillerDesc: Adds volume and shape using HA gel.
cost.compareFlipDesc: Relaxes upper lip muscle to roll out slightly. No true volume.

faq.q1: How long do lip fillers last?
faq.a1: Most lip fillers last about 6 to 12 months, depending on filler type, metabolism, and how much is injected.
faq.a2: Most people describe it as uncomfortable but manageable. Numbing methods and lidocaine-containing fillers help reduce pain.
faq.q3: How long does lip filler swelling last?
faq.a3: Swelling often improves within 24 to 48 hours, but it may take up to a week to settle fully.
faq.q4: How much is lip filler in Malaysia?
faq.a4: Ranges vary. Many clinics quote around RM 1,000 to RM 2,500 per syringe, while others cite RM 1,200 to RM 3,500+ per 1 ml depending on brand and expertise.
faq.q5: Will lip filler make me look fake?
faq.a5: Not if the plan is conservative and suited to your lips. A natural look usually comes from small, well-placed amounts and not chasing extreme volume.
faq.a6: Most HA fillers can be dissolved using an enzyme called hyaluronidase when medically indicated.

cta.title: Lips That Still Feel
cta.desc: People come to us because they want a soft, natural look that matches their face. Not a trend. Not a template.
